allow: PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 6968 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 5368,6156,13208,14236,14244,17016 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, @{N="WS_MB";E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, @{N="CPU_sec";E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,0\)}}, @{N="WS_MB";E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,0\)}}, StartTime | Sort-Object StartTime -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-30\) } | Select-Object Id, @{N="CPU_sec";E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,0\)}}, @{N="WS_MB";E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,0\)}}, StartTime | Sort-Object StartTime -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize; $parent = Get-Process -Id 13352 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($parent\) { "Parent 13352 still alive: CPU=$\([math]::Round\($parent.CPU,0\)\)s WS=$\([math]::Round\($parent.WorkingSet64/1MB,0\)\)MB" } else { "Parent 13352 gone" })
PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, @{Name='RSS_MB';Expression={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB, 1\)}}, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, WorkingSet64, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel)
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('server.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('server.py parses OK'\)")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$u='\\''http://localhost:5000'\\''; for\($i=0; $i -lt 3; $i++\){ try{ Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 1 | Out-Null; Write-Output '\\''OK'\\''; break } catch{ Write-Output "miss $i"; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200 } }')
